headline: MDL Parsimony-Fidelity Deficit across complexity: G2 deficit 0.055 (simul@K9 0.934, 3 actions); G4 deficit 0.112 (simul@K9 0.864, 5 actions); G12 deficit 0.427 (simul@K9 0.527, 14 actions). Confirms the tension: the CrystalScore 0.938 corner (G2, deficit~0) is the DEGENERATE low-complexity end; as the K-simplex vocabulary grows the K<=9 story CANNOT reproduce the policy and the deficit rises — a real Pareto frontier (short story vs full fidelity), so no policy scores 1 on both. CRYSTAL-1 is near-ideal only on the low-complexity leg; Axis A is the demanding metric the saturated scalar hid.
